title: Usage Stats Error
excerpt: Hello. I am trying to figure out how to report on my team’s usage. I noticed the usage stats in the admin section. But when I go to the Insights tab I get the following error: “There was a problem fetching your accounts’…

posts.author: Koji (Koji Daggett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. I am trying to figure out how to report on my team’s usage. I noticed the usage stats in the admin section. But when I go to the Insights tab I get the following error: “There was a problem fetching your accounts’ Admin Insights data”

I am not even sure I should have insights, as we are not on the enterprise plan but the pro plan. But there is no Basic tab, only Insights, Storage, and Advanced, and nothing fills in on the Insights tab.

Is there any way to fix this? Is this something I would contact support about? (The regular support or the nonprofit support?)

Also, is there a better way to report usage? I need detailed usage stats to take back to my team, especially on who is not using Monday.

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Koji! And thank you for this question! As this is a monday platform error and inquiry, this question would go to monday support. You can reach out to them directly here: support@monday.com

Please let me know if you need anything else!
